Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Hmm, this is a detailed process description about property onboarding for a management company. The user wants me to generate targeted questions to clarify and deepen understanding of the process, focusing on missing details, decision criteria, roles, timing, and exception handling.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The process has several clear stages: documentation review, property manager assignment, inspections, marketing, tenant screening, and final checks. Each stage has potential gaps or ambiguities that questions could address.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I should organize the questions by process phase to make them logical and easy to follow.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For documentation, I can ask about verification steps and common issues. For property manager assignment, the criteria for workload and specialization need clarification. The inspection phase has dependencies and exception possibilities worth exploring. Marketing and tenant screening involve multiple stakeholders and decisions. Finally, the post-marketing phase includes compliance checks and system integration.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The questions should be open-ended to encourage detailed responses, not just yes/no answers. I can avoid technical jargon and keep them conversational while covering all key areas mentioned in the process description.
